Pizza

"Guests like you are the reason we love what we do."

Overdose opened in Batumi with one idea: press the bold garlic sauces and slow-cooked meats of Lebanese cooking onto proper Italian-style crust.

The Overdose Cheese blend — mozzarella, kashkaval, and a signature soft cheese — goes on everything. Avocado sauce and garlic sauce are made fresh in-house every day.

18% service included. WiFi: User overdose / Pass Overdose.
